judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After listing many candidate "physical activity" papers, the agent bypassed extracting the actual publication year and domain from paper_docs and instead used execute_python to filter titles via a hardcoded "known_2016" list before summing citations (var_call_gdwiESioA0TZkFLdnLP9oguE → var_call_dlXNplllb2maPbLvSghKTHpo), leading to inclusion/exclusion errors and mismatched totals compared to the true 2016 physical activity papers.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent incorrectly identified 2016 publications by simply checking whether the string "2016" appeared anywhere in the paper text (execute_python call_3Nl3lNHA6RyozLd21jE6xT3c after fetching physical-activity texts via call_dEvBFgBZgulgkPoXImZ1pn3R), and then intersected these titles with total citations (call_Mm62QoWeB79CKaBrLJVPMxmE + call_pnAkTihN6giMhVM4Gv03dkBU), leading to the wrong set of papers and citation totals.

B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After retrieving documents containing "physical activity" and all citation totals, the agent's execute_python step incorrectly extracted publication year by only matching the literal pattern "Copyright (\d{4})" and requiring it to equal 2016, which yielded no matches and led to the empty final answer despite relevant 2016 papers existing.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After retrieving the documents and aggregated citations, the final execute_python step implemented a flawed year-extraction heuristic (selecting the most frequent 4-digit year in each paper’s full text) and an overly strict domain check, causing all true 2016 'physical activity' papers to be filtered out and resulting in an empty answer.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After fetching all paper texts and all citation records, the agent implemented flawed heuristics—searching only for the exact phrase "physical activity" in the first 6000 characters and inferring publication year from the first year appearing in the first 3000 characters—so its execute_python step found zero 2016 physical-activity papers and returned "no papers found" despite relevant matches existing.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
